title: Baki Hanma
sourceNotes: Cumulative eps 1-39 across Hanma Baki (2021, 12 eps) + Hanma Baki Season 2 (2023, 27 eps split into two 13/14-ep cours). Adapts the `Hanma Baki: Son of Ogre` manga (314 ch). Successor to `baki.json`; precedes `baki-dou` (Baki-Dou 2014 manga, anime adaptation aired 2026). Arc-level approximation.
